---
format: html
---

:::{.callout-warning collapse=true appearance='default' icon=true}
## Master to-do list for this course

+ add real data example to session 2
+ first drafts from session 3 onwards
+ add glossary items and explanation

:::

:::{.callout-note collapse=true appearance='default' icon=true}
## Ideas to follow up

### Comprehensive vs quality
Could happily talk to Andrew Campbell about how to keep datafying to a sensible lean minimum. SCODAS presentation 17/3/26 about DAiSy - keeping dataset lean (including removing variables from a set) by working with analysts and non-analytical stakeholders. Focus on improvable data

+ What do you need to report on? What's a nice-to-have? What's not needed?
+ Data quality comes from engagement
+ Compromising between quality and comprehensiveness

## Bridging sessions
+ qualitiative data?
+ maybe the "making sense of other people's data" session?
:::
